mapper.select: select * from task where user_id = #{userId} order by created_at desc
select * from task where user_id = #{userId} and category = #{category} order by priority desc, created_at desc
select * from task where user_id = #{userId} and priority = #{priority} order by created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into task (user_id, title, description, exp_reward, coin_reward, category, due_date, priority, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{expReward}, #{coinReward}, #{category}, #{dueDate}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update task set title = #{title}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, due_date = #{dueDate}, priority = #{priority}, status = #{status}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
